---
name: Adapter proposal
about: Propose a new or changed capR source adapter
title: "[adapter] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Source and use case

Describe the R object, owning package, and intended use.

## Source family

Which existing source family applies? Explain any request for a new family.

## Adapter metadata

- Adapter ID:
- Version:
- Provider:
- Maturity:
- Semantic level:
- Conformance claim:

## Field catalog

List proposed field IDs, timing, trust, execution classes, levels, and symbolic contracts.

## Resolution

Describe S3 bridge, registry registration, priority, and ambiguity behavior.

## Security and privacy

Describe I/O, credentials, sensitive data, traversal, and follow-up behavior.

## Evidence plan

- [ ] adapter contract tests
- [ ] negative tests
- [ ] snapshots
- [ ] fixture or conformance evidence, when applicable
- [ ] documentation
